How This Assessment Works

The Career Scaffolding™ Diagnostic evaluates your responses against the Career Scaffolding™ framework, a model designed to assess the structures that support long-term career growth.

This assessment does not currently compare results against an external population benchmark. Insights are generated based on the relationship between your responses across the dimensions measured by the framework.
